checklist.name: Metadata completeness
checklist.requirement: Every ingestible chunk must include the full metadata.schema.json field set, using null or empty arrays only where the schema permits.
static_validation: Validate each chunk metadata object against metadata.schema.json.
Reject additionalProperties not declared in metadata.schema.json.

Reject missing brand, language, country, market, audience, channel, document_type, effective_date, version, status, risk_level, legal_approved, safety_related, related_part_ids, and compatible_model_ids.

checklist.name: Domain and audience isolation
checklist.requirement: Each source must be assigned to exactly one P0 knowledge domain and the chunk audience must be allowed by that domain.
static_validation: knowledge_domain must be one of the six configured domain keys.
metadata.audience must be included in knowledge_domains.json domains[knowledge_domain].allowed_audiences.
metadata.document_type must be included in knowledge_domains.json domains[knowledge_domain].allowed_document_types.

checklist.name: PII and confidential data redaction
checklist.requirement: Personal data, customer identifiers, order numbers, tickets, private dealer notes, and raw photos or videos must be redacted before static knowledge ingestion.
static_validation: Published chunks must have pii_redacted=true.
Dealer, internal, service, support_agent, or sales audience chunks must use restricted or confidential security_classification.
Public consumer chunks must not use confidential security_classification.

checklist.name: Legal and safety approval
checklist.requirement: Policy, legal, recall, safety, and high-risk service content must be approved before publication and must retain versioned approved wording.
evidence: Approval owner or ticket reference in source governance system
static_validation: If safety_related=true, legal_approved must be true and risk_level must be high or critical.
If document_type is safety_notice or recall_notice, knowledge_domain must be safety_and_recall.
If document_type is safety_notice or recall_notice, safety_related must be true.

checklist.name: Lifecycle and expiration policy
checklist.requirement: Current answers may only use published chunks with effective_date set; time-bound policies, announcements, service bulletins, and recalls must include valid_until or an explicit null for still-active content.
static_validation: status must be draft, review, legal_review, published, deprecated, or archived.
Only status=published chunks are eligible for production retrieval.
valid_until must be a date or null; deprecated and archived chunks must not be used unless explicitly requested for historical context.

checklist.name: Chunking strategy selected
checklist.requirement: The ingestion job must apply the chunking mode, token range, overlap, and boundary rules configured for the target knowledge domain.
static_validation: Target domain must have recommended_chunking_strategy.mode.
Target domain must have target_tokens.min and target_tokens.max.
Target domain must have at least one boundary_rules entry.

checklist.name: Retrieval filters configured
checklist.requirement: The consuming Dify app or external retrieval layer must apply domain-level metadata filters before answer generation.
static_validation: Each domain retrieval_strategy.metadata_filters must include knowledge_domain, language, country, market, audience, and status unless a stricter domain-specific list is configured.
Each domain retrieval_strategy must set rerank=true for P0.
Each domain retrieval_strategy.minimum_score must be between 0 and 1.

checklist.name: Static versus dynamic knowledge separation
checklist.requirement: Dynamic facts such as inventory, price, order status, ticket status, appointment availability, serial-number recall hits, and final warranty decisions must not be ingested as static knowledge.
evidence: External tool or rules service owner
Rejected dynamic content log when applicable
static_validation: document_type must not be used to represent live order, inventory, price, ticket, appointment, or serial-number status.
Compatibility and warranty chunks may explain policy or evidence requirements, but final decisions must route to external_rule_service or human review.

checklist.name: Annotation candidate coverage
checklist.requirement: High-risk and legally sensitive questions must have annotation-first coverage before the related content is enabled for production retrieval.
static_validation: safety_and_recall annotation_policy.required must be true.
warranty_policy annotation_policy.required must be true.
Each annotation_first_categories item must include use_annotation_first and cite_official_source in required_actions.

checklist.name: Source provenance
checklist.requirement: Each chunk must trace back to a governed source document and owner team so replacement, rollback, and audit are possible.
static_validation: source_document_id must match metadata.schema.json pattern.
owner_team must be one of the allowed metadata.schema.json owner_team values.
source_uri must be a URI reference or null.
